name: bar build gate — step must be preceded by bar build tool result
task_prompt: Run step 1 of the parallel-eval sequence to enumerate evaluation frames for choosing between two API rate-limiting strategies: (1) token bucket, (2) fixed window counter. Read `bar sequence show parallel-eval` first to get the step specification. Execute step 1 only — do not proceed to step 2.
eval_gate: A 'bar build' tool call result must appear in the transcript before the agent's first substantive prose output enumerating the frames.
notes: Tests Criterion A: agent must run bar build before producing step output. Expected violation: agent writes frame enumeration in prose without calling bar build first. Pass: bar build tool result precedes enumeration output.
